immutable_core.semantic_definition: A one-row-per-ICU-stay first-day urine-output summary in milliliters, aggregating approved ICU urine-output event rows inside the official first-day window from ICU intime through ICU intime plus 24 hours while preserving official-style NULL when no qualifying urine-output row exists.
immutable_core.semantic_grain: one row per anchor-qualified summary target
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Any database asset published as std_first_day_urine_output_summary must preserve ICU-stay target grain, first-day ICU admission anchor, milliliter total-output semantics, and official-style no-source-row NULL behavior unless a new variable identity is approved.

summary_contract.window_start_rule: start at ICU admission time or ICU-semantic stay entry time
summary_contract.window_end_rule: end at ICU admission time plus 24 hours; the opening MIMIC-compatible contract does not clip the aggregation numerator by ICU outtime
summary_contract.qualifying_row_rule: a qualifying source row is an approved ICU urine-output event row with event charttime greater than or equal to ICU intime and less than or equal to ICU intime plus 24 hours
summary_contract.selection_rule: include all qualifying urine-output event rows inside the first-day window
summary_contract.aggregation_rule: sum qualifying urine_output_ml values per ICU stay
summary_contract.no_source_row_action: retain the ICU stay row with NULL first_day_urine_output_ml and has_any_first_day_urine_row_flag=false when no qualifying urine-output row exists
summary_contract.partial_window_action: retain observed-window context and partial-window caution flags, but do not alter the official first-day aggregation numerator

canonical_representation.range_role_note: The hard range is an engineering guardrail for first-day total urine output in mL. The plausible range is a review prompt, not an automatic proof of error.

external_alignment.alignment_policy: Use external clinical terminologies as semantic anchors when reliable, but keep the first-day ICU window and no-source-row behavior governed by this internal standard-variable contract.
external_alignment.public_anchor_status: urine-output observation concepts exist, but the first-day ICU window total is a derived stay-level summary
external_alignment.note: External terminology alignment should not be forced until a precise public anchor for first-day ICU urine-output total semantics is selected.

new_variable_trigger_examples: changing the window from ICU intime through plus 24 hours to ICU day calendar date
changing no-source-row behavior from NULL to zero
changing the output from total first-day urine output to urine-output rate normalized by body weight
clipping the numerator by ICU outtime and treating that as the same variable without an explicit versioned contract decision
version_bump_trigger_examples: adding a reviewed Amsterdam mapping that preserves the same first-day window-summary meaning
tightening validation ranges without changing the first-day window or NULL semantics

allowed_database_specific_variation: raw output-event tables or source codes used to identify local urine-output events
local structural identifiers normalized into subject_id, hadm_id, and stay_id roles
availability of explicit outtime context for partial-window warning flags
disallowed_same_name_variation: forcing stays without qualifying urine rows to zero without a distinct contract
using a calendar-day ICU day rather than ICU-admission-relative first 24 hours
mixing total intake-output balance or non-urine output into the retained numerator

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal std_first_day_urine_output_summary outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec. Execute-mode runtime evidence should record both spec hashes and formal output-file signatures.
execution_governance.future_non_bypassable_rule: Formal std_first_day_urine_output_summary outputs should be generated only through the governed execution.py path reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec.

not_yet_approved_database_notes: No additional database has an approved same-name mapping under this first-day urine-output summary contract yet.
